_comment: Small domain corpus (industrial water-treatment control). Knowledge dependencies are NOT given: the pipeline infers them (doc A depends on doc B when A's text mentions B's title), derives a read order, then autoregressively induces an entity-type schema (collapsing plural/synonym labels) and does schema-guided extraction. Foundational notes (Sensors, Controllers) are mentioned by later notes, so they are read first.

documents.title: Sensors
documents.text: Sensors measure water level and pressure. A sensor reports readings to the plant.

documents.title: Controllers
documents.text: Controllers read sensors and decide actions. A controller controls the pump based on readings.

documents.title: Pumps
documents.text: Pumps move water through the pipeline. A pump regulates flow across the pipeline.

documents.title: Operating Procedure
documents.text: The operator follows the procedure. Controllers monitor sensors and the operator opens the valve.

documents.title: Safety Protocol
documents.text: The safety protocol defines alarm thresholds. An alarm triggers when a sensor exceeds a threshold. The safety protocol extends the Operating Procedure.
